logos.description: Veloura Collection wordmark logo — VC monogram with sparkle accents and brand name text on dark background.
Veloura Collection logo mark only — VC monogram with sparkle accents, no text.

products.name: Coach Tabby Shoulder Bag 26 With Pillow Quilting
products.description: Iconic Tabby 26 flap shoulder bag in plush diagonal-quilted black nappa leather with sculpted brass signature C closure and leather-woven chain strap. Wear on the shoulder or crossbody.

products.name: Coach Tabby Shoulder Bag 26 With Pillow Quilting
products.description: Tabby 26 flap shoulder bag in deep wine quilted leather with brass C-clasp hardware and convertible leather-woven chain strap. Rich jewel tone for fall styling.

products.name: Coach Tabby Shoulder Bag 26 With Pillow Quilting
products.description: All-black edition of the quilted Tabby 26 with blacked-out pewter hardware and tonal chain strap for a monochrome, edgier look.

products.name: Coach Soft Tabby Shoulder Bag in Signature Jacquard
products.material: Signature C jacquard fabric with leather trim
products.description: Soft Tabby flap shoulder bag in airy pale-blue signature jacquard with silver C-buckle closure, top handle strap and adjustable crossbody strap.

products.name: Coach Cargo Tote in Denim
products.description: Structured Cargo Tote in washed indigo denim with embroidered Coach New York script, brass turnlock closure, double top handles and tan leather hangtag.

products.name: Coach Juno Mini Hobo in Signature Denim
products.material: Signature C denim jacquard with leather trim
products.description: Crescent-shaped mini hobo in signature denim jacquard with polished clip-buckle handle and dangling silver C chain charm. Compact hand-held silhouette.

products.name: Coach Juno Hobo in Leather
products.description: Juno crescent hobo in smooth lilac leather with silver clip-buckle handle and C chain charm. Playful pastel pop for the collection.

products.name: Coach Charter Crossbody 24 in Signature Jacquard
products.material: Signature C jacquard fabric with leather trim
products.description: Slim camera-style crossbody in olive signature jacquard with double zip compartments, matte black hardware and tonal leather hangtag.

products.name: Coach Charter Crossbody 24 in Signature Jacquard
products.material: Signature C jacquard fabric with leather trim
products.description: Camera-style double-zip crossbody in midnight navy signature jacquard with tonal navy leather trim and hangtag. Streamlined everyday carry.

products.name: Coach Mini Sierra Satchel in Signature Canvas with Cherry Charm
products.material: Signature coated canvas with leather trim
products.description: Dome-shaped mini satchel in light khaki signature canvas with chalk leather trim, double rolled handles, gold hardware and glossy red cherry bag charm.

products.name: Coach Nolita 19 in Signature Canvas
products.description: Compact barrel-shaped Nolita 19 pouch in heather grey signature coated canvas with top zip closure and tonal leather hangtag. Carry as clutch or add a strap.

products.name: Coach Hobo Shoulder Bag in Signature Canvas
products.material: Signature coated canvas with leather strap
products.description: Classic trapezoid hobo shoulder bag in khaki signature canvas with saddle-tan leather strap, gold Coach New York plaque and leather hangtag.

products.name: Coach Hobo Shoulder Bag in Signature Canvas
products.material: Signature coated canvas with leather strap
products.description: Trapezoid hobo shoulder bag in dark brown signature canvas with black leather strap and trim, gold Coach New York plaque. Timeless neutral colorway.

products.name: Coach Studded Flap Crossbody
products.description: Flap crossbody in black pebbled leather trimmed with mixed brass dome studs, detachable top-handle strap and gold chain crossbody strap.

products.name: Coach Studded Flap Crossbody
products.description: Flap crossbody in chalk-white pebbled leather with brass dome stud trim, short shoulder strap and gold chain strap. Bridal-ready ivory finish.

products.name: Coach Teri Shoulder Bag in Signature Canvas
products.material: Signature print coated canvas with leather trim
products.description: Sleek Teri shoulder bag in brown signature-print canvas with dark brown leather trim, gold Coach New York plaque, top zip and decorative charm pull.

products.name: Coach Teri Shoulder Bag in Signature Jacquard
products.material: Signature C jacquard fabric with leather trim
products.description: Teri shoulder bag in chalk signature jacquard with dove-grey leather trim, silver hardware and detachable adjustable crossbody strap.
